GG0170A1_ROLL_STRT_CD GG0170A1 Mobility: Roll Left Right Ability at SOC/ROC Indicates the patient's ability to roll left and right at the start of care/resumption of care. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up;
